name: video-downloader-platform
description: Enterprise SEO-Driven Multi-Platform Video Downloader powered by yt-dlp

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && echo '✅ Setup complete!'
